title: Bionano Genomics Q3 Revenue Falls 35% Despite OGM System Growth; Reports Mixed Results
text: Bionano reported mixed third-quarter results with concerning revenue trends but positive operational metrics. The company's Q3 2024 revenue reached $6.1 million, representing a significant decline from the prior year period. Q3 2024 revenue was $6.1 million, which comprises $6.6 million in core product and software sales offset by write-downs, totaling a 35% year-over-year decrease. The installed base of optical genome mapping systems expanded to 368 units—a 22% increase compared to the same quarter last year. Consumable sales showed strength, with 7,835 nanochannel array flowcells sold in Q3 2024, representing a 27% increase from the prior year. Bionano's balance sheet reflects ongoing pressures. The company maintained cash, cash equivalents, available-for-sale securities, and restricted cash totaling $23.4 million, though $11.4 million faced restrictions. The gross margin deteriorated significantly, with GAAP gross margin at negative 139%, though non-GAAP adjustments showed a 26% margin. The company raised capital through offerings and maintained $17.0 million in convertible debentures outstanding. The stock declined 7.58% following the announcement, reflecting investor concerns about the substantial revenue contraction despite operational improvements.
